description: Top-level learning index for the consulting team. Points at two parallel tracks (PDPA and GDPR) plus a cross-reference module. Each track is independently versioned and refreshed as the underlying regime evolves.

documents: concepts.md — concept-by-concept equivalence (data subject vs data subject; data controller vs controller; sensitive PD vs special category; ...)

verificationCaveat: Material is illustrative only. Never legal or regulatory advice. For client-facing work verify against the BM source PDFs in Tech-Audit/Regulatory/PDPA/References/Guidelines/ (PDPA) and the EUR-Lex consolidated text + EDPB Guidelines (GDPR).
